zh.title: 嗨！歡迎來到我的網站!
zh.body:
這是我第一個用 React 製作的簡易中英文履歷 SPA，之後用 Next.js 重寫過一次。
    RWD 的部分，我使用了 Tailwind 讓網站有響應式設計，歡迎縮放網頁試試看！
    希望你會喜歡！

en.title: Welcome to my website!
en.body:
This is my first personal CV single page application built with React, later rewritten with Next.js.
    As for Responsive Web Design, I used Tailwind to make the site responsive — please feel free to resize the window and play around!
    Hope you enjoy it!
